description: A simple demo todo list app — preset for ab-harness amend fixtures.

userStories.title: List todos on home screen
userStories.description: Render existing todos when the user opens the app.
acceptanceCriteria: Todos render from local storage on load
Empty list shows a placeholder message

userStories.title: Add new todo
userStories.description: Allow the user to add a new todo to the list.
acceptanceCriteria: Pressing Enter on the input appends a new todo
